hero.name: Marcin Czembrowski
hero.description: I build modern web and mobile applications with passion for great user experiences.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Get to know me better
about.description: I'm a passionate developer from Wroclaw, Poland, with experience in building full-stack applications. From mobile apps to complex web systems, I enjoy tackling challenging problems and creating solutions that make a difference.
about.paragraph2: My journey in programming started with curiosity and has evolved into a deep commitment to continuous learning. I specialize in Flutter, Python, and mobile development, always staying up-to-date with the latest technologies.

marmoEdu.title: Marmo EDU
marmoEdu.shortDesc: Award-winning Flutter mobile & web app with Python backend, integrating multiple educational data sources.
marmoEdu.description: A comprehensive multiplatform application designed to revolutionize education with modern technology.

discordBot.title: School Helper Bot
discordBot.shortDesc: Discord bot helping students with schedules and school information during COVID.
discordBot.description: A utility bot created during the pandemic to help students stay informed about schedule changes, current timetables, and daily school updates.

hero.title: Marmo EDU
hero.subtitle: Award-Winning Educational Platform
hero.description: A comprehensive Flutter mobile and web application with full Python backend, connecting students to multiple educational data sources in one unified platform.

overview.title: Project Overview
overview.description: Marmo EDU is a full-featured educational platform that combines a polished Flutter application (mobile & web) with a robust Python backend. The app integrates with multiple data sources including Librus, Edupage, JakDojade, and WolneLektury to provide students with a unified hub for all their educational needs. Built with Docker for scalability and featuring fast, secure Google Sign-In for multiplatform availability and enhanced user experience.

features.title: Key Features
features.mobileDesc: Flutter app for mobile and web with intuitive UI/UX, available everywhere
features.backendDesc: Python FastAPI backend with MariaDB and Meilisearch, deployed via Docker
features.realtimeDesc: Real-time push notifications keeping students informed of changes
features.secureDesc: Fast and secure authentication for safer, seamless user experience
features.integrationsDesc: Connected to Librus, Edupage, JakDojade, WolneLektury and more

award.title: 1st Place
award.subtitle: XXXII Kalisz IT Competition
award.description: The project was recognized for its programming complexity, graphic design, and future development potential. The committee awarded the main prize in the secondary schools category.

hero.title: LO IX Katalog
hero.subtitle: Interactive School Catalog
hero.description: A next-generation school presentation platform for Liceum Ogolnoksztalcace nr IX in Wroclaw, helping prospective students explore the school's offerings.

overview.title: Project Overview
overview.description: LO IX Katalog is an interactive web platform designed to showcase the educational offerings of one of Wroclaw's top high schools. The platform features immersive 360-degree virtual tours, an engaging scavenger hunt game, and AI-powered chat assistance to help students choose the right class profile. Over 7,000 visits demonstrate the platform's effectiveness in reaching prospective students and their parents.

features.title: Key Features
features.tourDesc: Immersive virtual tours allowing prospective students to explore the school
features.huntDesc: Interactive game-based exploration powered by FastAPI Python backend
features.aiDesc: Intelligent chatbot helping students choose the right class profile
features.cmsDesc: Strapi CMS backend for easy content management and updates

stats.title: Impact
stats.visitorsDesc: Students and parents explored the school offer through this platform

upcoming.title: Coming Soon
upcoming.description: Currently preparing for the next release with enhanced features including 360 tours, scavenger hunt, and powerful AI assistance.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Let's work together
contact.description: I'm always interested in hearing about new projects and opportunities. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, feel free to reach out!

phase1.title: Project Inception
phase1.description: Initial concept development, market research, and requirements gathering. Defined core features and technical architecture.

phase2.title: Backend Development
phase2.description: Built the Python FastAPI server with MariaDB, Meilisearch, and Docker containerization for scalability.

phase3.title: Flutter App Development
phase3.description: Developed the cross-platform Flutter application for mobile and web with Google Sign-In integration.

phase4.title: Data Integrations
phase4.description: Integrated multiple data sources: Librus, Edupage, JakDojade, WolneLektury, and implemented push notifications.

phase5.title: Launch & Recognition
phase5.description: Official release, user onboarding, and subsequent award recognition for the project.
